name: evolver-tools
description: 218 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 218 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v27: scan-open-ports — TCP port scanner with concurrent scanning and service detection
ascii-banner — ASCII art banner generator (block, simple, wide, big fonts)
code-review — Basic code review: line length, TODOs, shebang, trailing whitespace, docstrings
csv-dedup — Deduplicate CSV rows by key column or all columns
json-path — Query JSON with simple path syntax — dot notation, bracket, wildcard
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
